overall.description: A first-person walk along a wet industrial highway at dusk in a cyberpunk city. The camera moves steadily past traffic lights, industrial structures, and neon-lit street lamps while futuristic vehicles occasionally pass by. The scene features a moody atmosphere with a mix of industrial decay and distant futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway approach with traffic control

events.description: futuristic black sedan approaches from behind and overtakes on the left
passes under large overhead traffic light gantry
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of the wet highway toward the traffic light gantry

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan overtaking the camera position with red taillights visible

entered.detail: large overhead traffic light structure with multiple signal heads and directional arrows
striped construction barriers lining the right side of the road
tall metal lattice electricity pylons with multiple cross-arms
low flat-roofed industrial building with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet industrial highway at dusk, approaching a traffic light gantry. A futuristic sedan overtakes from behind as the camera walks forward. The traffic light changes from red to green as the camera passes underneath the gantry, with industrial power towers visible on the left and striped barriers on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved industrial highway with distant city views

events.description: road curves to the right revealing the illuminated city skyline ahead
passes under a bright street lamp casting orange light on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved highway with the city skyline now visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the dark blue sky
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sky along the left roadside

segments.scene_description: The highway curves gently to the right, opening up a panoramic view of the distant city skyline with glowing skyscrapers. The camera continues walking past street lamps that cast warm orange reflections on the wet asphalt, while palm trees appear on the left and the industrial power towers recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to second traffic intersection

events.description: approaches second traffic light gantry showing red signals
traffic light changes from red to green
passes under second traffic light gantry

agents.ego_description: walking toward the second traffic intersection as the light changes from red to green

notable_agents.action: vehicle with headlights on approaching in the distance

entered.detail: second overhead traffic signal structure with red lights illuminated

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a second traffic light gantry, with the city skyline now visible to the right. The traffic signal changes from red to green as the camera walks underneath. The industrial warehouse exits the frame while street lamps continue to line the wet pavement, and distant vehicle headlights appear on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet industrial highway that gradually transitions from a confined utility corridor into an open vista of a glowing cyberpunk skyline. It begins by approaching a traffic light gantry as a futuristic sedan overtakes from behind, passing under the signal as it turns green amidst industrial power towers and striped barriers. As the highway curves gently to the right, the industrial structures recede and the view expands to reveal a panoramic skyline of distant skyscrapers, with warm orange street lamps reflecting off the damp asphalt and palm trees appearing on the left. The scene then shifts toward a second traffic light gantry, with the city skyline now framing the right side of the view. Finally, the camera passes under the second green signal as the industrial warehouses exit the frame and distant vehicle headlights emerge on the left.
